message:
fix(dashboard): use actual termweb version instead of workspace:*

- Change termweb dependency from workspace:* to ^0.9.6
- Add CI job to auto-update termweb version when main package releases
- Bump dashboard to 0.2.3

files.patch:
@@ -168,6 +168,41 @@ jobs:
       - name: Publish to npm (OIDC)
         run: npm publish --provenance --access public
 
+  update-dashboard-dep:
+    needs: [auto-tag, publish-npm]
+    if: needs.auto-tag.outputs.should_release == 'true'
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    permissions:
+      contents: write
+
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Update termweb version in dashboard
+        run: |
+          VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")
+          cd packages/dashboard
+          # Update termweb dependency version
+          sed -i 's/"termweb": "[^"]*"/"termweb": "^'"$VERSION"'"/' package.json
+          # Check if changed
+          if git diff --quiet package.json; then
+            echo "No changes needed"
+            echo "changed=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          else
+            echo "Updated termweb to ^$VERSION"
+            echo "changed=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          fi
+        id: update
+
+      - name: Commit and push
+        if: steps.update.outputs.changed == 'true'
+        run: |
+          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
+          git config user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
+          git add packages/dashboard/package.json
+          git commit -m "chore(dashboard): update termweb to ^$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")"
+          git push
+
   publish-dashboard:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     permissions:

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "termweb-dashboard",
-  "version": "0.2.2",
+  "version": "0.2.3",
   "description": "Terminal-based system monitoring dashboard powered by termweb",
   "bin": {
     "termweb-dashboard": "bin/cli.js"
@@ -36,7 +36,7 @@
   "dependencies": {
     "chart.js": "^4.4.1",
     "systeminformation": "^5.21.0",
-    "termweb": "workspace:*",
+    "termweb": "^0.9.6",
     "ws": "^8.14.0"
   },
   "devDependencies": {
